# protonic

> A design system for AI agents and humans.

## Documentation

- [Getting started](https://example.com/getting-started): How to install and use protonic.
- [Components](https://example.com/components): Component API reference.

## Content guidelines

- [CONTENT.md](CONTENT.md): Voice, tone, status vocabulary, and per-component copy patterns (Spanish-primary, German secondary). Required reading for any agent that generates or reviews visible strings.
